metrics.top_terms: node, data-id, data-kind, traces, kind, title, information, mini, derivation, matter, math, consciousness, status, emergent, dead

sections.title: Canonical Interactive Proof Map
sections.text:
::: sub
A restrained academic explorer: not a flashy demo, but a layered proof surface where assumptions can be inspected, alternative primitives can be traced, and closure conditions can be tested.
:::
:::::
:::::: header-right
::: badge
click = expand proof
:::
::: badge
toggle = epistemic layer
:::
::: badge
trace = worldview propagation
:::
::::::
::::::::::
::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: {#foundationBand .section .band}
::: band-title

sections.title: Foundation spine
sections.text:
:::
::::::::::::::::::::::::::: stack
:::::: {.node data-id="existence" data-kind="axiom" traces="information matter math consciousness emergent"}
::: kind

sections.title: Axiom
sections.text:
:::
::: title
A1.1 --- Something exists rather than nothing.
:::
::: meta
Self-refuting to deny.
:::
::::::
:::::: {.node data-id="distinction" data-kind="axiom" traces="information matter math consciousness emergent"}
::: kind

sections.title: Axiom
sections.text:
:::
::: title
A1.2 --- Existence requires distinction.
:::
::: meta
Knowability requires differentiability.
:::
::::::
:::::: {.node data-id="primacy" data-kind="axiom" traces="information matter math consciousness emergent"}
::: kind

sections.title: Axiom
sections.text:
:::
::: title
A1.3 --- Distinguishability is information; information is primitive.
:::
::: meta
Critical branching point.
:::
::::::
:::::: {.node data-id="substrate" data-kind="definition" traces="information"}
::: kind

sections.title: Definition
sections.text:
:::
::: title
A2.1 / D2.1 --- Information requires substrate → Logos field substrate.
:::
::: meta
Self-grounding substrate selected.
:::
::::::
:::::: {.node data-id="selfground" data-kind="commitment" traces="information"}
::: kind

sections.title: Commitment
sections.text:
:::
::: title
A2.2 --- Self-grounding chosen.
:::
::: meta
Explicit framework commitment, not disguised derivation.
:::
::::::
:::::: {.node data-id="axioms189" data-kind="derivation" traces="information"}
::: kind

sections.title: Derivation
sections.text:
:::
::: title
189 axioms unfold from substrate, coherence, and closure constraints.
:::
::: meta
The architecture proceeds from this compression base.
:::
::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::::
::: connector
▼ alternative primitive branches
:::
::::::::::::::::::: {.row .cols-4}
:::::: {.node data-id="matterAlt" data-kind="derivation" status="dead" traces="matter"}
::: kind

sections.title: Alternative
sections.text:
:::
::: title

sections.title: Matter primitive
sections.text:
:::
::: mini
Dead-end: matter is only describable through informational properties --- mass, charge, spin, position.
:::
::::::
:::::: {.node data-id="mathAlt" data-kind="derivation" status="dead" traces="math"}
::: kind

sections.title: Alternative
sections.text:
:::
::: title

sections.title: Mathematics primitive
sections.text:
:::
::: mini
Dead-end: mathematical structure describes relations but does not instantiate a substrate.
:::
::::::
:::::: {.node data-id="mindAlt" data-kind="derivation" status="dead" traces="consciousness"}
::: kind

sections.title: Alternative
sections.text:
:::
::: title

sections.title: Consciousness primitive
sections.text:
:::
::: mini
Dead-end: consciousness still presupposes distinguishable states and a processing substrate.
:::
::::::
:::::: {.node data-id="emergentAlt" data-kind="derivation" status="dead" traces="emergent"}
::: kind

sections.title: Alternative
sections.text:
:::
::: title

sections.title: Information emergent
sections.text:
:::
::: mini
Dead-end: emergence requires a prior structured system, so regress remains open.
:::
::::::
:::::::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::
::::::::::::::::::::::::: {#pairsBand .section .band}
::: band-title

sections.title: Five paired subsystems
Pair
sections.text:
:::
::: title
(G,R) Gravity / Resurrection
:::
::: mini
Remove G or R → equation does not close.
:::
::::::
:::::: {.node data-id="matterPair" data-kind="equation" traces="information matter"}
::: kind

sections.title: Pair
sections.text:
:::
::: title
(M,S) Matter / Entropy
:::
::: mini
Matter without informational ordering collapses into label-free brute postulate.
:::
::::::
:::::: {.node data-id="energy" data-kind="equation" traces="information consciousness"}
::: kind

sections.title: Pair
sections.text:
:::
::: title
(E,F) Energy / Faith
:::
::: mini
Faith treated as observation coupling, not sentiment.
:::
::::::
:::::: {.node data-id="quantum" data-kind="equation" traces="information math consciousness"}
::: kind

sections.title: Pair
sections.text:
:::
::: title
(Q,C) Quantum / Coherence
:::
::: mini
Closed subsystems conserve coherence; they do not self-increase it.
:::
::::::
:::::: {.node data-id="time" data-kind="equation" traces="information emergent math"}
::: kind

sections.title: Pair
sections.text:
:::
::: title
(T,K) Time / Knowledge
:::
::: mini
Action framed as minimal-K path under knowledge constraints.
:::
::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: {#bifurcationBand .section .band}
::: band-title

sections.title: Bifurcation chamber
Bifurcation
sections.text:
:::
::: title

sections.title: Internal bifurcation: sin-pole / grace-pole
sections.text:
:::
::: mini
Entropy / decoherence vs. negentropy / external restoration.
:::
::::::
:::::: {.node data-id="born" data-kind="equation" traces="information consciousness"}
::: kind

sections.title: Equation
sections.text:
:::
::: title
Faith = observation coupling
:::
::: mini
Born-rule framing: potential amplitude to measured outcome.
:::
::::::
:::::: {.node data-id="nonunitary" data-kind="equation" traces="information"}
::: kind

sections.title: Theorem
sections.text:
:::
::: title
Grace = external non-unitary operator
:::
::: mini
Closed unitary self-operations cannot flip sign-state into higher coherence.
:::
::::::
:::::::::::::::
::::::::::::::::::: {.row .cols-4 style="margin-top:12px"}
:::::: {.node data-id="timewall" data-kind="commitment" traces="information math emergent"}
::: kind

sections.title: Commitment
sections.text:
:::
::: title
Time Wall marked intentional, not a gap.
:::
::: mini
Incompleteness becomes bounded design rather than accidental failure.
:::
::::::
:::::: {.node data-id="terminal" data-kind="derivation" traces="information consciousness"}
::: kind

sections.title: Derivation
sections.text:
:::
::: title
Measurement chain terminates in terminal observer.
:::
::: mini
Otherwise the chain remains formally open.
:::
::::::
:::::: {.node data-id="binary" data-kind="commitment" traces="information"}
::: kind

sections.title: Commitment
sections.text:
:::
::: title
A8.1 --- Binary moral orientation via SU(2) choice.
:::
::: mini
Forced, not cosmetically chosen.
:::
::::::
:::::: {.node data-id="coherenceLaw" data-kind="derivation" traces="information matter math"}
::: kind

sections.title: Law
sections.text:
:::
::: title
Closed systems cannot self-increase coherence.
:::
::: mini
Open-system dependence is therefore required.
:::
::::::
:::::::::::::::::::
::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::: {#evidenceBand .section .band}
::: band-title

sections.title: Convergence and evidence strip
Evidence
sections.text:
:::
::: title
Oxford convergence: 4 / 7 independently confirmed.
:::
::: mini
The visual role is supportive, not substitutional for derivation.
:::
::::::
::::::::::::::: {.row .cols-3}
:::::: {.node data-id="ecp" data-kind="evidence" status="pass" traces="information"}

sections.title: Reject external grace
sections.text:

Works-based sign-flip impossible.
:::

:::::: {.node data-id="rejectInfo" data-kind="derivation" status="dead" traces="matter math consciousness emergent"}
::: kind

sections.title: Rejection test
sections.text:
:::
::: title

sections.title: Reject information primacy
sections.text:
:::
::: mini
Matter / math / mind inherit unresolved regress or circularity.
:::
::::::
:::::: {.node data-id="rejectTime" data-kind="derivation" status="dead" traces="matter math emergent"}
::: kind

sections.title: Rejection test
sections.text:
:::
::: title

sections.title: Reject Time Wall
sections.text:
:::
::: mini
Intentional incompleteness denied; system overclaims completion.
:::
::::::
:::::: {.node data-id="rejectObserver" data-kind="derivation" status="dead" traces="consciousness matter math emergent"}
::: kind

sections.title: Rejection test
sections.text:

sections.title: Reject terminal observer
sections.text:

Measurement chain remains open.
:::
::::::
:::::: {.node data-id="rejectCoherence" data-kind="derivation" status="dead" traces="matter math emergent"}
::: kind

sections.title: Rejection test
sections.text:
:::
::: title

sections.title: Reject coherence conservation
sections.text:
:::
::: mini
System loses closure constraints and thermodynamic discipline.
:::
::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::
::: connector
▼ boundary-condition judgment
:::
::::::::::: {.row .cols-2}
:::::: {.node data-id="closure" data-kind="derivation" status="pass" traces="information"}
::: kind

sections.title: Closure
sections.text:
:::
::: title
Christianity closes the boundary-condition system.
:::
::: mini
Claimed on completeness, uniqueness, and terminal-observer closure.
:::
::::::
:::::: {.node data-id="altsfail" data-kind="derivation" status="dead" traces="matter math consciousness emergent"}
::: kind

sections.title: Comparison
sections.text:
:::
::: title
Alternatives fail completion / uniqueness / terminal observer.
:::
::: mini
The trace tool shows where each branch strains or terminates.
:::

claims.forward_test: If the claim is true, the stated relationship should preserve its variables, direction, and scope.
claims.reverse_test: If the pattern can appear without the proposed framework, the claim should be downgraded or narrowed.
claims.kill_conditions: Needs an explicit failure case: what observation, logic result, or counterexample would make this claim false?
claims.not_claimed: Does not by itself claim that physics proves theology.
claims.proof_boundary: Current boundary: deterministic pass classifies this as Formal Model, not a final proof.
